allow: Bash(gcloud run services describe petlove-backend --region us-central1 --format="yaml\(spec.template.spec.containerConcurrency, spec.template.metadata.annotations, status.conditions\)")
Bash(gcloud run services describe petlove-backend --region us-central1 --format="value\(spec.template.spec.timeoutSeconds\)")
Bash(gcloud run services update petlove-backend --region us-central1 --max-instances 1 --quiet)
Bash(gcloud logging read 'resource.type=""cloud_run_revision"" AND resource.labels.service_name=""petlove-backend"" AND textPayload=~""TEST_RACE""' --limit=20 --format='value\(textPayload\)')

Bash(gcloud logging read 'resource.type=""cloud_run_revision"" AND resource.labels.service_name=""petlove-backend"" AND \(textPayload=~""ERROR"" OR textPayload=~""❌"" OR textPayload=~""duplicate key"" OR textPayload=~""ENV CHECK""\)' --limit=20 --format='value\(timestamp,textPayload\)' --freshness=10m)

Bash(gcloud logging read 'resource.type=""cloud_run_revision"" AND resource.labels.service_name=""petlove-backend"" AND timestamp>=""2026-03-02T15:09:00Z"" AND timestamp<=""2026-03-02T15:10:00Z""' --limit=50 --format='value\(textPayload\)')

Bash(gcloud logging read 'resource.type=""cloud_run_revision"" AND resource.labels.service_name=""petlove-backend"" AND textPayload=~""SYNC""' --limit=15 --format='value\(timestamp,textPayload\)' --freshness=5m)

Bash(gcloud logging read 'resource.type=""cloud_run_revision"" AND resource.labels.service_name=""petlove-backend"" AND \(textPayload=~""QUEUE"" OR textPayload=~""SYNC"" OR textPayload=~""duplicate key""\)' --limit=30 --format='value\(timestamp,textPayload\)' --freshness=3m)

Bash(gcloud logging read 'resource.type=""cloud_run_revision"" AND resource.labels.service_name=""petlove-backend"" AND \(textPayload=~""SYNC"" OR textPayload=~""duplicate key"" OR textPayload=~""Conflicto""\)' --limit=20 --format='value\(timestamp,textPayload\)' --freshness=3m)

Bash(gcloud logging read 'resource.type=""cloud_run_revision"" AND resource.labels.service_name=""petlove-backend"" AND \(textPayload=~""Server running"" OR textPayload=~""Scheduler"" OR textPayload=~""SYNC.*START"" OR textPayload=~""SYNC.*END"" OR textPayload=~""error"" OR textPayload=~""Error""\)' --limit=30 --format='value\(timestamp,textPayload\)' --freshness=10m)

Bash(gcloud logging read 'resource.type=""cloud_run_revision"" AND resource.labels.service_name=""petlove-backend"" AND textPayload=~""TEST_RACE""' --limit=20 --format='value\(textPayload\)' --freshness=3m)
